text:
Register the new App ID `app.lillist.Widget` on the Apple Developer account with
App Group `group.app.lillist` and CloudKit container `iCloud.app.lillist`, and
generate the matching provisioning profiles (Development / Ad-Hoc for iOS,
Developer-ID for macOS). Until this exists, only Simulator and unsigned builds
work — signed iOS-device / macOS builds and `/deployit` fail at signing.
(Priority: high. Labels: widget, signing, blocker.)
